ddls:
CREATE TABLE "procurement_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement project */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the project is scheduled */,
  "app_code" TEXT /* Application code for the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the procurement project */,
  "pmo_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PMO or end-user responsible */,
  "procurement_mode" TEXT /* Mode of procurement used for the project */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule detailing the procurement activities */,
  "source_of_funds" TEXT /* Source of funds for the project */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total allocated budget for the project */,
  "moo_e" REAL /* MOOE allocation for operational expenses */,
  "co" REAL /* CO allocation for capital outlay */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks regarding the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "project_location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "project_category" TEXT /* Category of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_projects_pmo_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("pmo_user_id") REFERENCES pmo_users ("pmo_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_projects_source_of_funds FOREIGN KEY ("source_of_funds") REFERENCES fund_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_projects_procurement_mode FOREIGN KEY ("procurement_mode") REFERENCES procurement_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pmo_users" (
  "pmo_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PMO or end-user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role or designation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pmo_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the procurement mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the procurement mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the procurement mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fund source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "moo_e" REAL /* MOOE allocation for operational expenses */,
  "co" REAL /* CO allocation for capital outlay */,
  "budget_status" TEXT /* Status of the budget allocation */,
  "budget_date" TEXT /* Date of the budget allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES procurement_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_remarks" (
  "remark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remark */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "remark" TEXT /* The remark or note regarding the project */,
  "remark_date" TEXT /* Date of the remark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_remarks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES procurement_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "pmo_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  "access_level_description" TEXT /* Description of the access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES procurement_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES procurement_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES procurement_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_logs" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification was sent */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES procurement_projects ("project_id")
)
